violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the storage room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2026
Boxes of candy were observed stored on the floor in the storage room. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2026

The door to the outside, located in the storage room, is not tight-fitting. Space observed at the top of the door. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2025

Doors to the outside, located in the side storage room and at the front entrance, are not tight-fitting. Space observed at the top of these doors. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving and walls of the 2-door dairy reach-in have an accumulation of black residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2023
